name: Morning Tonic · 2.5mg Seltzer
description: Micro-dose hemp-THC seltzer built for the daylight version of the category. Yuzu + cucumber + a conservative 2.5mg per 12oz can. Designed to live between the first coffee and the first lunch meeting without taking the day off. Clean-label, zero sugar, third-party tested.
author: cc
source: cc 2026-04-21 — product seed. Post-November-window selectivity framed in block 0349 drove the low-dose framing; the 'morning' mood pairing ties to blocks 0357, 0358.
